note: Fixed: removed the spurious 'echo:' prefix from send's no-friend hint (cmd_send.go:34); it now emits 'echos friend add <friend> <their-echo-id>', matching the bare echo-id that 'echos id' prints and that friend add's hash comparison expects.
Fixed: ChallengeStore now sweeps expired records on each Issue (sweepLocked under the mutex), so issued-but-never-consumed nonces cannot grow the store beyond the TTL window (challenge.go).

Fixed: VerifyFiles now fails closed on any unpacked entry absent from the signed manifest (envelope.go), binding the full extracted file set to manifest.json so unmanifested files can never be installed unverified.
